metadata.description: The official Microsoft Work IQ plugin collection

plugins.name: workiq
plugins.description: Query Microsoft 365 data with natural language — emails, meetings, documents, Teams messages, and more.

plugins.name: microsoft-365-agents-toolkit
plugins.description: Toolkit for building Microsoft 365 Copilot declarative agents — scaffolding, JSON manifest development, and capability configuration.

plugins.name: workiq-productivity
plugins.description: WorkIQ productivity skills powered by the local WorkIQ CLI — read-only insights across email, meetings, calendar, Teams, SharePoint, projects, and people.

plugins.name: workiq-email-sender
plugins.description: Compose and send Outlook emails or save drafts via Microsoft Graph API — send, draft, and follow-up on emails directly from Copilot.
